description: Glowing lava cracks using inverted Worley F2-F1 with FBM displacement and domain warping for organic flow.

modifiers.notes: Invert F2-F1 so cracks become bright veins

example_prompts: use inverted Worley F2-F1 with domain warp for glowing lava cracks
create volcanic magma texture with bright veins on dark rock
generate emissive lava flow using cellular noise and FBM displacement

screenshot_metadata.notes: Use pow(n, 3) to sharpen veins. Map to orange-yellow-white gradient. Add subtle animation via time offset.
